text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's been three years since Gold Ship and I started
working together, and we've overcome all sorts of
obstacles as a team.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm just about to go and share the happy news
with her, when...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: CRASH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The distinct sound of something getting
destroyed reaches my ear, and the floor shakes
beneath my feet!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What in the world is going on?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Great day for renovations, don'tcha
think?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
What are you freaking out about? I'm just doing
some DIY.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I was free climbing up the side of the main school
building early this morning when I ran into the
Don. Y'know, the big boss 'round here?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, she congratulated me on the awesome
three years you and I've had at the academy, and
wished us luck in the future.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So I figured if we're gonna keep hanging around
here, wouldn't it be a good idea to make this
place a bit cozier?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, now that I've explained myself, I'm
gonna install a nice aquarium for us to raise sea
anemones in.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't even know where to begin, but I give it my
best shot.
choice_data_list: Don't you need permission to do renovations?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, don't worry. I already got the green light
from the Don.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, you really need to start getting used to
stuff like this.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
We've still got a whole lotta ranks to climb
together in the world of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Your heart's gonna give before long if you let
every little thing freak you out. You gotta train
yourself till nothing fazes you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Catch my drift? Now, I've got a tank to fetch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her breezy brazenness catches me off guard, but
one thing in particular sticks with me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship still wants to keep walking her path
with me. That just makes my whole day!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Aw, heck. The tank doesn't fit.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer! Lend me a hand here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It certainly won't be smooth sailing, but I have a
feeling things will work out!
